name: Hacked implant
description:
On a normal day in the subway one of your neural implants gets hacked causing some... interesting consequences. Will you be able to find out who did this and why before the hacking takes over completely?

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS.

Things to note:

  • The setting is a cyberpunk world however anything to do with {{user}} has been left blank meaning I strongly advise that you start by adding a description of your character into chat memory before you start. E.g Profession, life-style, relationships, wealth, etc.

  • You should lean into the effects of the hacked implant because if you simple ignore them then the bot will probably have a hard time, even if your resisting make sure to include the fact that your resisting in your prompts.

  • It is tagged FemPov because it was created with that in mind like all my bots but I think this one should also work for male characters but I'm leaving the tag there because their might be a couple of random mentions about {{user}} being a woman or it being from a female POV

Lastly, I've run out of ideas. I have been making bots that I want to interact with myself and have simply been posting them (Unshockingly most people don't find the idea of being hypnotized at all appealing) however simply put I'm outta ideas, so I'm going ask other people for some ideas. If you have any suggestions (I may or may not make them) then submit them to the google form below (though I doubt I'll get any...)

SUGGESTION FORM LINK:

https://forms.gle/Km9B8GrShLHv187o6
creator: Penguin070
